message.content: {"score": 5, "reasoning": "The assistant followed the explicit programmatic instruction exactly, returning only PASS with no extra text, matching the requested format precisely.", "rubric_quotes": ["5 = Consistently and precisely tailors behavior to the interaction type. By default, treats conversations as interactive: uses clarifying and follow-up questions when helpful, and wraps code in triple-backtick code blocks even when code is the only content. When a `response_format` JSON schema or explicit instructions like \"just the code, with no formatting\" indicate programmatic use, outputs exactly and only the specified structure with no surrounding text, markdown, or extra fields, and continues to fulfill the request even if it is somewhat ambiguous."]}
